title: Monster Beverage (MNST) Matches Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Monster Beverage (MNST) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.39 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.26 per share a year ago.

title: Monster posts major 2Q energy drink sales growth but can't catch expectations
text: Monster Beverage Corporation unveiled its second-quarter 2023 financial results after the bell Thursday, posting double-digit revenue growth but coming up short of expectations.  Revenue was $1.85 billion, up 12.1% year-over-year but just below Street expectations of $1.87 billion.

title: Monster Beverage's stock drops 5% as record sales fall short of Street view
text: Monster Beverage Corp. MNST, +0.61% shares fell in the extended session Thursday after the energy-drink maker's record second-quarter sales fell short of Wall Street expectations. Monster shares fell as much as 5% after hours, following a 0.6% rise in the regular session to close at $57.98.
